name: Sir Finance Corporation
description_short: Family-owned Chicago lender offering personal loans to employed individuals with same-day approval, no credit check required, and direct deposit verification.
description_long:
Sir Finance is a family-owned and operated lending company based in Chicago with two physical locations (6140 N. Lincoln Avenue and 424 W. 31st Street). The company has been in operation since 1962, serving thousands of employed borrowers seeking fast personal loans. Their business model focuses on income-verified lending rather than traditional credit assessment.

Sir Finance offers personal loans designed for employees with stable employment and direct deposit income. The application process is streamlined: applicants can apply online, by phone (1-844-633-3747), or by faxing documentation for pre-approval. The company advertises same-day approval and funding for most loans, positioning itself as a solution for individuals needing immediate cash. Their marketing emphasizes confidentiality, speed, and a simplified process without credit checks.

What distinguishes Sir Finance is their employment-based lending criteria rather than credit-dependent approval. They require verifiable full-time employment for at least one year, active direct deposit, and recent pay stubs and tax documentation. This approach targets working individuals who may have credit challenges but stable income. They operate physical branch locations for in-person service during business hours (Monday-Friday 9am-5pm CST, Saturdays 9am-3pm CST) and maintain fax and online application options.

The company's lending terms, interest rates, and loan amounts are not disclosed on their website, which is a significant limitation for consumer research. While they claim no credit checks and fast approval, the absence of transparent pricing information prevents full assessment of competitiveness. Their reliance on employment verification and direct deposit requirements may exclude self-employed, gig workers, and those without traditional employment structures. The company appears to serve a specific niche but lacks transparency typical of modern lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day approval and funding for most loans according to their claims
No credit check required—approval based on employment and income verification
Minimum one-year employment requirement provides stability focus
Two physical Chicago locations open Saturdays for in-person service
Multiple application methods: online, phone, fax, and in-person
Family-owned and operated business with 60+ years of history (since 1962)
cons: No loan amounts, interest rates, or APR information disclosed on website—critical pricing transparency absent
Limited to full-time employees with direct deposit only; excludes self-employed, gig workers, and others without traditional employment
Requires one year of employment history, excluding recent job starters
Only two physical locations in Chicago—no online-only or nationwide accessibility mentioned
No information about loan terms, repayment periods, or total cost of borrowing
best_for: Full-time employees with stable direct deposit income and at least one year employment history
Chicago-area residents needing immediate cash who prefer in-person service
Individuals with credit challenges or lack of credit history but verifiable employment income
Borrowers seeking a simple, non-credit-check alternative to traditional banks
diagnosis: Sir Finance is best for full-time Chicago-area employees with stable direct deposit income and at least one year of employment history who need quick access to cash and prefer employment-based lending over credit-dependent approval. The primary caveat is the complete absence of transparent pricing information—loan amounts, interest rates, fees, and terms are not disclosed, making it impossible to assess whether rates are competitive or whether this lender is suitable before application.
services: Online loan application for new customers
In-person loan service at two Chicago branch locations
Loan paperwork requests for existing/returning customers
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
